name: chess-empire-database
description: Chess Empire database — admin/coach/student app. JS sources are loaded directly via <script> tags; this package.json exists only to declare Node-side dev dependencies used by the test suite.

scripts.test: node tests/test-tournament-parser.js && node tests/test-tournament-importer.js && node tests/test-tournament-xlsx-accept.js && node tests/test-tournament-xlsx.js && node tests/test-tournament-upload-parser.js && node tests/test-tournament-upload-validation.js && node tests/test-coach-leaderboard-formula.js && node tests/test-razryad-detection.js
